summary: Iteration 19: Tested proposal creation workflow with signature/stamp images and error handling. Both features work correctly - proposals with large base64 images (signature+stamp) are created successfully, and Pydantic validation errors display readable field-specific messages instead of '[object Object]'.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <select>' - minor hydration warning from React

action_items: NONE - Both tested features working correctly
critical_code_review_comments: CreateProposalPage.js lines 167-216: Error handling correctly parses Pydantic validation errors - extracts field names from loc array and displays readable messages
GET /api/defaults/signatory endpoint correctly returns base64 signature and stamp images (signature: ~92KB, stamp: ~305KB)
POST /api/proposals successfully handles ~400KB payloads with embedded base64 images

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Signature/stamp images load correctly, proposal creation works, error messages display properly

seed_data_creation: Used existing form ID: 7fe294dd-e1dc-4c68-8a16-61eeedc51b8a (UI Test Company)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Proposal creation workflow with signature and stamp images is fully functional. The error handling improvement in CreateProposalPage.js correctly parses Pydantic validation error arrays and displays readable field-specific messages. Note: The form email field 'aa.com' is invalid data from the source application form - this is a data issue, not a code issue.

findings: Both images visible in Authorized Signatory section
POST /api/proposals accepts ~400KB payload with base64 images
Success alert: 'تم إنشاء عرض السعر وإرساله للعميل!' (Proposal created and sent)
User redirected to /dashboard after successful creation
When invalid email submitted, error message shows: 'body -> contact_email: value is not a valid email address'
NO '[object Object]' displayed - Pydantic validation errors are properly parsed
Error handling code in lines 167-216 correctly handles Array.isArray(detail) case

details: test_get_default_signatory - Verifies /api/defaults/signatory returns valid base64 images
test_create_proposal_with_valid_data - Creates proposal with signature/stamp (~400KB payload)
